name: comp-jco-vet-clinic-nats
description: The vet-clinic app with a durable NATS JetStream KV store — the same store the wasmCloud keyvalue-nats provider uses, persistent across restarts

scripts.prep: cd ../jco-vet-clinic && npm install && npm run transpile
scripts.start: npm run prep && VET_KV_BACKEND=nats VET_KV_BACKEND_MODULE="$PWD/kv-backend.js" PORT=${PORT:-3003} tsx ../jco-vet-clinic/src/server.ts
